description: The ContactItem component is used in the contacts tab of the Dash Menu to be a contact in the list of contacts on that screen.

fields._background: The background element of the contact item.
fields._statusIndicator: The image used to indicate the user status of the contact item.
fields._thumbnail: The thumbnail Component of that user's profile picture.
fields._thumbnailTexture: The texture being used to show a user's profile picture.
fields._username: The text showing the user's username.
fields._status: The text showing the user's status.
fields._unreadCount: The text showing the number of unread messages from the user.
fields._joinButton: The button that can be used to join the user.
fields._rawUsername: The raw string of the user's username without ignore tags.
fields._alternateNames: A list of names the user may have had before.

methods.OnJoin: What to run when joining the user that corrosponds to this contact item.
